text:
Thierry Henryfully expectsKylian Mbappeto sign forReal Madridand will continue pushing for the forward’s inclusion in his Olympic squad thissummer.

The France captain is thought to have agreed a move to the Santiago Bernabeuwhen his contract at Paris Saint-Germain expires in June.

A move to the Spanish capital will see Mbappe link up with fellow France internationals Eduardo Camavinga, Aurélien Tchouaméni and Ferland Mendy who will all hope to be involved in France’s Euro 2024 squad this summer.

The three are also selection options for Les Blues at Paris 2024, with Arsenal legend Henry leading the side as they seek to win gold on home soil.

Clubs across Europe are bracing themselves for selection rows however with the campaign in Paris set to clash with the start of new domestic seasons in August.

Real Madrid have already sought to lay down a marker, with L’Equipe reporting Real Madrid will refuse to release any of their players.

Arsenal could find themselves in a similar position with William Saliba, who could be picked for the squad.

Metro's Head of Sport James Goldman delivers punchy analysis, transfer talk and his take on the week's biggest stories direct to your inbox every week.

Sign up here, it's an open goal.

Henry however will keep pushing to ensure every player his available.

‘I haven’t spoken to Kylian about it yet,’ Henry said in an interview with Le Parisien.

‘But, what do you want me to say to him and what do you want Kylian to say to me? Is he going to fight with his club? Be careful, here we are speculating without knowing if his destiny will be his.

‘The only thing we know about Kylian is that he is leaving. It doesn’t matter where he goes. But if he goes to Real Madrid, we already know that they will not let their players go.

Henry continued: ‘I wouldn’t stop there. We are talking about Kylian, but there are also Camavinga, Tchouaméni and Mendy. I will keep trying until the end, because I want the best team.

‘But we return to the same debate: What can be done apart from being polite, asking and asking again and again?

‘It’s like when, at Christmas, you have asked your parents for the same gift ten times, without result, and you ask for it again for the eleventh time… You have to ask for it. Who stops at the first refusal?’

title: Thierry Henry sends message to Kylian Mbappe over Real Madrid move and Olympics call up | Football | Metro News
description: Thierry Henry fully hopes to convince Kylian Mbappe's club to let him play for France in the Olympics.
keywords: Football,Sport,Euro 2024,France football team,Kylian Mbappe,Real Madrid,Thierry Henry
